indicators.name: seated arrangement of tables and chairs
indicators.rationale: The seating arrangement is designed for lectures and meetings, not for yoga or stretching.

indicators.name: tables and chairs obstructing floor space
indicators.rationale: The tables and chairs are arranged in rows, leaving no open floor space for yoga or stretching.

indicators.name: lack of open floor area
indicators.rationale: There is no unobstructed floor space available for yoga or stretching.

indicators.name: no yoga mats or props
indicators.rationale: No yoga mats or other props are present, which are essential for yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for yoga or stretching due to the obstructed floor space and lack of any open area suitable for these activities. The presence of tables and chairs arranged in rows further exacerbates the issue, making it impossible to perform yoga or stretching in this space.
